title: <name> and the Case of the Missing Teddy

pages.text: One sunny morning, <name> woke up to find that his favorite teddy was missing from the bed.

Oh no! Where could Teddy be? he wondered, rubbing his eyes. He noticed a tiny trail of buttons leading across the room. Tiptoeing carefully so he wouldn’t miss a clue, <name> followed them past the toy box and around the little chair.

Maybe Teddy went on an adventure! he whispered. Next, he saw a single sock peeking out from under the cupboard. Crawling under the bed, he peeked and saw a little bouncing ball that Teddy must have been chasing.

Hmm… Teddy must be nearby, <name> said, giggling. He asked his toy giraffe and his little robot if they had seen Teddy. The toys couldn’t answer, but the robot’s shiny buttons pointed toward the kitchen. Carefully, <name> tiptoed in and followed a crumb trail leading to the cupboard.

There, to his delight, Teddy was sitting inside the laundry basket, looking cozy and cheerful! Found you, Teddy! <name> cheered, hugging him tight. He learned that curiosity, patience, and following the clues carefully can solve any tiny mystery — even when it’s just a teddy on a secret adventure.
